info.title: tye:
info.description: Developer tools and publishing for microservices.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Interactive mode

options.name: --tags
options.description:
Filter the group of running services
by tag.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Output verbosity

options.name: --framework
options.description:
The target framework hint to use for
all cross-targeting projects with
multiple TFMs. This value must be a
valid target framework for each
individual cross-targeting project.
Non-crosstargeting projects will
ignore this hint and the value TFM
configured in tye.yaml will override
this hint.

options.name: --no-default
options.description:
Disable default options from
environment variables

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description: file or directory, can be a yaml, sln, or project file

options.name: --no-default

options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description: file or directory, can be a yaml, sln, or project file

options.name: --no-build
options.description:
Do not build project files before
running.

options.name: --port
options.description: The port to run control plane on.

options.name: --logs
options.description:
Write structured application logs to
the specified log provider. Supported
providers are 'console', 'elastic'
(Elasticsearch), 'ai'
(ApplicationInsights), 'seq'.

options.name: --dtrace
options.description:
Write distributed traces to the
specified tracing provider. Supported
providers are 'zipkin'.

options.name: --metrics
options.description:
Write metrics to the specified metrics
provider.

options.name: --debug
options.description:
Wait for debugger attach to specific
service. Specify "*" to wait for all
services.

options.name: --docker
options.description: Run projects as docker containers.

options.name: --dashboard
options.description: Launch dashboard on run.

options.name: --watch
options.description:
Watches for code changes for all
dotnet projects.
